title: pydna-group/pydna: Wienerbröd-patch4 v5.5.16
author: Björn Johansson
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
What's Changed 
 
 Remove unneeded license parts by @manulera in https://github.com/pydna-group/pydna/pull/635 
 Bump sgffp from 0.18.0 to 0.19.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/pydna-group/pydna/pull/639 
 Add support for blunt ligation when parsing SnapGene history + allow parse from bytes by @manulera in https://github.com/pydna-group/pydna/pull/638 
 
  Full Changelog : https://github.com/pydna-group/pydna/compare/v5.5.15...v5.5.16
